title: Daily Driver: Club GTi
summary: My GTi Club: Supermini Festa! obsession has bled into my game Daily Driver … the “Club GTi” car features smaller wheels than the standard size, more roll during turning, and lots of detail and decoration to show off the rendering workflow I spent so many hours on. A good choice for the autotesting/motorkhana/gymkhana stages. Here’s the 3D model, created in…
content:
My GTi Club: Supermini Festa! obsession has bled into my game Daily Driver… the “Club GTi” car features smaller wheels than the standard size, more roll during turning, and lots of detail and decoration to show off the rendering workflow I spent so many hours on. A good choice for the autotesting/motorkhana/gymkhana stages.

Here’s the 3D model, created in OpenSCAD.
